languages.text: "Полковник Батошски, разрешите доложить!" {n}Янур выступает вперед и салютует огромному мужчине, сурово смотрящему на вас.{/n} "3-ий взвод обеспечения выдвинулся на миссию и нашел выживших после крушения летательной машины. Лидер выживших опознан{mf||а} как Вольный Торговец фон Валанциус!"
languages.translation_comment:
В конце звук ропота толпы
Янур после куя кланяется или отдает честь и уходит.

languages.text: "Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"
languages.original_text: "Полковник Батошски, разрешите доложить!" {n}Янур выступает вперед и салютует огромному мужчине, сурово смотрящему на вас.{/n} "3-ий взвод обеспечения выдвинулся на миссию и нашел выживших после крушения летательной машины. Лидер выживших опознан{mf||а} как Вольный Торговец фон Валанциус!"

traits.locale_text: "Colonel Batoshski, permission to report!" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a military salute to the huge man, who gives you a stern look.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon moved out on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group is identified as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

"Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

"Colonel Batoshski, permission to report!" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a military salute to the stern man.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon moved out on a mission and found survivors from the downed shuttle. The only encounter with the Drover ended in victory. The leader of the survivors introduced {mf|himself|herself} as {name} von Valancius..."

"Colonel Batoshski, permission to report!" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a military salute to the huge man, who gives you a stern look.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon moved out on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group is identified as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

"Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

"Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

languages.text: 「バトシュスキー大佐、報告の許可を！」{n}ジャンヌが前に出て、厳しい男に軍礼をする。{/n}「第3補給中隊は任務に出動し、墜落したシャトルの生存者を見つけた。ドルーバーとの遭遇は勝利に終わった。生存者のリーダーは、ヴァランシウス家の{mf|彼|彼女}であると名乗った…」
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, permission to report!" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a military salute to the stern man.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon moved out on a mission and found survivors from the downed shuttle. The only encounter with the Drover ended in victory. The leader of the survivors introduced {mf|himself|herself} as {name} von Valancius..."

traits.locale_text: 「バトシュスキー大佐、報告の許可を！」{n}ジャンヌが前に出て、厳しい男に軍礼をする。「第3補給中隊は任務に出動し、墜落したシャトルの生存者を見つけた。ドルーバーとの遭遇は勝利に終わった。生存者のリーダーは、ヴァランシウス家の{mf|彼|彼女}であると名乗った…」

languages.translation_comment:
В конце звук ропота толпы
Янур после куя кланяется или отдает честь и уходит.

languages.text: "Colonel Batoshski, bitte um Erlaubnis, Bericht zu erstatten." {n}Janur tritt vor und salutiert vor dem riesigen Mann, der dich eindringlich mustert.{/n} "Der dritte Versorgungszug hat im Rahmen einer Mission Überlebende der abgestürzten Flugmaschine entdeckt. {mf|Der Anführer|Die Anführerin} der Gruppe hat sich als {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} identifiziert!"
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: "Colonel Batoshski, bitte um Erlaubnis, Bericht zu erstatten." {n}Janur tritt vor und salutiert vor dem riesigen Mann, der dich eindringlich mustert.{/n} "Der dritte Versorgungszug hat im Rahmen einer Mission Überlebende der abgestürzten Flugmaschine entdeckt. {mf|Der Anführer|Die Anführerin} der Gruppe hat sich als {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} identifiziert!"

languages.text: « Colonel Batoshski, permission de faire mon rapport ? » {n}Janur s'avance d'un pas et salut le géant, qui pose sur vous un regard sévère.{/n} « Le 3e peloton d'approvisionnement déployé en mission a trouvé des survivants près de l'engin abattu. {mf|Le chef|La cheffe} du groupe s'est {mf|présenté|présentée} comme {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} von Valancius ! »
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: « Colonel Batoshski, permission de faire mon rapport ? » {n}Janur s'avance d'un pas et salut le géant, qui pose sur vous un regard sévère.{/n} « Le 3e peloton d'approvisionnement déployé en mission a trouvé des survivants près de l'engin abattu. {mf|Le chef|La cheffe} du groupe s'est {mf|présenté|présentée} comme {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} von Valancius ! »

languages.text: «Coronel Batoshski, ¿permiso para informar?» {n}Janur da un paso al frente y se cuadra ante el hombretón que te mira con gesto severo.{/n} «El tercer pelotón de suministros se desplegó como parte de una misión y encontró a los supervivientes de la máquina voladora derribada. ¡Su líder se ha identificado como Comerciante Independiente von Valancius!».
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: «Coronel Batoshski, ¿permiso para informar?» {n}Janur da un paso al frente y se cuadra ante el hombretón que te mira con gesto severo.{/n} «El tercer pelotón de suministros se desplegó como parte de una misión y encontró a los supervivientes de la máquina voladora derribada. ¡Su líder se ha identificado como Comerciante Independiente von Valancius!».

languages.text: "Albay Batoshski, rapor vermek için izin istiyorum." {n}Öne çıkan Janur, sana sertçe bakan devasa adama selam veriyor.{/n} "3. İkmal Müfrezesi göreve çıktı ve düşen uçan makineden kurtulanları buldu. Grubun lideri, kendisini Hür Tacir von Valancius olarak tanıttı!"
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: "Albay Batoshski, rapor vermek için izin istiyorum." {n}Öne çıkan Janur, sana sertçe bakan devasa adama selam veriyor.{/n} "3. İkmal Müfrezesi göreve çıktı ve düşen uçan makineden kurtulanları buldu. Grubun lideri, kendisini Hür Tacir von Valancius olarak tanıttı!"

languages.text: “巴托什斯基上校，军士雅努尔请求向您汇报！”{n}雅努尔上前一步，向那位严肃地看着你的壮汉敬了个礼。{/n}“第三后勤排执行任务途中，发现了坠毁飞行器中的幸存者。为首者自称是行商浪人冯·瓦兰修斯！”
languages.original_text: "Colonel Batoshski, permission to report?" {n}Janur steps forward and gives a salute to the huge man, who looks at you sternly.{/n} "The 3rd Supply Platoon deployed on a mission and found survivors from the downed flying machine. The leader of the group identified {mf|himself|herself} as Rogue Trader von Valancius!"

traits.locale_text: “巴托什斯基上校，军士雅努尔请求向您汇报！”{n}雅努尔上前一步，向那位严肃地看着你的壮汉敬了个礼。{/n}“第三后勤排执行任务途中，发现了坠毁飞行器中的幸存者。为首者自称是行商浪人冯·瓦兰修斯！”
